loop: Ralph Wiggum Loop - Iteration 6 - Venue Photo Gallery
status: DONE - All quality gates passed, build clean, 2512 tests passing
summary: Iteration 6 improvements: Added Venue Photo Gallery feature addressing PRD's 'Information Scarcity' pain point. (1) photoGallery.ts: Core utility with photo filtering by category, smart sorting (verified > newest > most liked), category labels (bilingual zh/en), photo statistics, relative date formatting, and URL validation. (2) PhotoGallery.tsx: Full UI component with thumbnail grid, category filter tabs, keyboard-navigable lightbox, like button with localStorage persistence, verified photo badges, and compact mode for LocationDetailPanel. (3) PhotoGallery.css: Complete mobile-first responsive styles with dark mode support. (4) 92 new tests across photoGallery.test.ts (58 tests) and PhotoGallery.test.tsx (34 tests). (5) Integrated as collapsible 'Photos' section in LocationDetailPanel with 'photos' added to expandedSections. (6) Added CSS import in App.tsx. Final state: 2512/2512 client tests passing (+92 new), 93/93 server tests passing, 0 TypeScript errors, build clean (1886 modules).
next_action: Project enhanced - all quality gates still passing with venue photo gallery
